data.body: All 8 child stories implemented, closed, and HMAC-signed by the completion-verifier (LLM gate ON). Commits: S1 cf40088a (graph→_store write path), S2 360a46f2 (optionality CI lane), S3 7fe02300 (doc-truth sweep), S4 cb196de9 (module-size gate), S5 974d40a4 (tombstone-boundary investigation+test), S6 fc5eb42e (5 duplication clusters DRYed), S7 f681ab87 (named budget + inbound field-map; 2 high-risk refactors deferred w/ rationale), S8 381f6bb9 (dead-code -207 LOC + hygiene). Verified: 2568 tests collect clean; interfaces parity (774), reconciler, graph, reducer suites green. NOTE: this epic introduced ZERO new ruff errors; a separate PRE-EXISTING ruff-gate breakage (29 errors from recent completion-verifier/sync commits) was filed as discovered work (deea-b923-2fcc-435e, discovered_from this epic) — not a regression from here.
